mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsPblancApplcntEntDao.select */ select apply_id , cmpny_type_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@CT_CODE_GROUP}', cmpny_type_cd) as cmpny_type , indust_realm_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@IR_CODE_GROUP}', indust_realm_cd) as indust_realm , fond_day , emply_cnt , resdng_nmpr , empmn_prearnge_nmpr , induty , main_induty , main_tchnlgy_product , zip , adres , enc_fxnum , enc_reprsnt_telno , enc_ceo_telno , enc_ceo_email , new_fntn_plan_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@NFP_CODE_GROUP}', new_fntn_plan_cd) as new_fntn_plan , fond_plan_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@FP_CODE_GROUP}', fond_plan_cd) as fond_plan , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt_ent where apply_id = #{applyId}
